During Rehabilitation Stay (ICD-9 Code) CHAR 7 An ICD-9-CM code indicating the complications or comorbidities that began after the rehabilitation stay started. This code identifies conditions which delayed or compromised the effectiveness of the rehabilitation program or represent high-risk medical disorders.
